verdict: A highly repetitive and lazy chart that relies almost exclusively on JUMP LR and copy-pasted patterns, draining the energy of the track.

issues.problem: Severe pattern repetition. The exact same sequences (such as JUMP LR -> U -> D -> L) are copy-pasted for dozens of measures, resulting in an incredibly monotonous playing experience.
Almost every single jump in the chart is a Left-Right (LR) jump. This lack of physical and visual variety ignores the song's stereo field and pitch shifts, showing lazy design.
Isolated 16th-note steps (e.g., at 27.054s and 27.977s) are awkwardly placed, disrupting the flow of the established 8th-note rhythm without clear musical backing.
